title: Kaths Simple Bossmobs
description: Adding a simple bossmob out of some enemies.
body:
| Bugs&News | All Projects | |-|-| | | | |[Direct link](https://discord.gg/vGY3PePuVd)|[Direct link](https://modrinth.com/user/Kathezel)| --- # What does it do? This datapack is adding 2 bossmobs which are randomly picked to summon out of existing mobs. *They are simple but still strong.* Sometimes a random Zombie or Skeleton is picked to convert into a bossmob. The bossmobs are equipped and have effects on them. Also they have a new loot-tables and drop way more EXP. **Datapacks good to combine: *Kaths-Skillsystem*.** (see below) # What does it all add? #### Overall: - 2 Bossmobs - 2 Woldbosses - new loot-tables World-/ Bossmobs are Zombies or Skelletons that turned into a Boss with extra effects and gear. #### Drops: - 1 Enchanted golden apple. - 1-2 EXP bottle. - 300 EXP points. - 1 armor- or weapon piece they wear. #### Bossmob attributes: - Normal Bossmob 200-500HP (100-250 hearts) - Worldboss 1000-1024HP (500-512 hearts) - Effects: Speed, Regeneration, Strength - Doesn't burn at daytime. # Spawn chance an how to increase it Default chance for every Zombie and Skeleton is 1/1000 | 0.1% For them to become a worldboss there is a 1/100 | 1% chance on top Change chance with this command: **/scoreboard players set Boss BossUUID {Value}** _Default is 10_ | Value | Chance | % | |-|-|-| | 1 | 1/10000 | 0.01% | | 10 | 1/1000 | 0.1% | | 100 | 1/100 | 1% | | 1000 | 1/10 | 10% | | 10000 | 1/1 | 100% | _1 score = 0.01% chance_ _Currently you can't change the chance for the worldboss._ # How to set up? just simply put it into the datapack folder and you are good-to-go
Uninstall: /function bmo:uninstall
# Multiplayer? It's also capable to be installed on servers. # Note for content creators: I'm interested in seeing people playing and/or giving feedback on my Datapacks. So if you are creating a video of any kind with or about my datapacks, I would be really happy to get notified on my discord about it, so I can see your feedback. Also if you allow me to, I would put it on the Modrinth page, so others can see a first impression. **This is not necessary, you don't have to!**
